NAME: FANTOM5 — Atlas of human long non-coding RNAs
DESCRIPTION: Comprehensive atlas of 27,919 human long non-coding RNA (lncRNA) genes with accurate 5' ends defined by CAGE. Provided a high-confidence catalog of lncRNAs with detailed annotation of their expression patterns, conservation, and genomic features across diverse cell types.
TITLE: An atlas of human long non-coding RNAs with accurate 5' ends
